description.value: They have thrown everything at you and you are not going to fall, and you are not going to move.

system.benefits:
You gain the following permanent abilities:

  • Last Stand: Once per combat, when an attack would reduce you to 0 HP, make a [[/save type=fortitude]] (1 success required). On success, drop to 1 HP instead and immediately gain temporary HP equal to your Constitution × 2.
  • Punishing Presence: Retribution now triggers on every melee hit against you rather than once per round. Its damage increases to Strength × 2.
  • Shield Lock: Once per combat as a [Combat] action, you may lock down one adjacent creature that is no more than one size category larger than you. For 1 minute or until they break free, the locked creature cannot move away from you, cannot target anyone other than you with melee attacks, and adds 1 to both attack dice while Shield Locked. At the start of each of their turns they may attempt to break free with an opposed Strength + [[/check skill=athletics]] against your Strength + Melee Combat (1 success breaks free).

usage.text: Passive + once per combat + once per combat
